settings.title: Settings
settings.pronHint: Override how specific words are spoken (e.g. names).
settings.auditoryTouchHint: First tap speaks the label. Second tap activates.
settings.dwellHint: Hold to activate instead of tap. For users with motor tremors.
settings.aboutText: Free, open-source communication for every child.
settings.aboutCredits: Shellcraft Labs LLC · MIT License · v{{version}}
settings.aboutArasaac: Symbols: ARASAAC (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0) · Gobierno de Aragón
settings.editModeHint: When on, tapping any button (built-in or custom) opens its edit form instead of speaking. A banner stays at the top with a Done Editing button. Long-press (2.5 seconds) any button to edit it without turning Edit Mode on.
settings.firstThenHint: Build sentences using a FIRST/THEN structure. A two-slot panel replaces the speech box and auto-speaks "First X, then Y".
settings.touchDelayHint: Press and hold every button for the selected duration before it activates. Helps slow down rapid tapping.
settings.pinLockHint: When on, tapping the Settings button will ask for a 4-digit PIN. Leave off to keep Settings open for everyone.
settings.pinForgotHint: ⚠️ If you forget your PIN, you will need to clear the app data to reset it — there is no recovery.
settings.factoryResetHint: Deletes all boards, symbols, settings, and AI voices. Keeps language preference. Cannot be undone.
settings.translateHelp: Want to help translate FreeVoice into your language?
settings.translateGuide: See the translation guide on GitHub

pin.title: Enter PIN
pin.subtitle: Enter your 4-digit PIN
pin.removeSubtitle: Enter your current PIN to disable the lock
pin.createSubtitle: Choose a 4-digit PIN to lock Settings
pin.forgotWarning: ⚠️ If you forget your PIN, you will need to clear the app data to reset it.

onboarding.characterSubtitle:
Pick the character that looks most like {{name}}.
They'll appear on emotion symbols throughout the app.
onboarding.tips:
Tap symbols to build sentences. Tap SPEAK to say them aloud.

Triple-tap the top-right corner for parent settings.
onboarding.tip2: ⭐ MY WORDS tab for custom phrases

addSymbol.title: Add Symbol
addSymbol.phrasePlaceholder: e.g. I want to call Grandma

empty.addSymbols: Tap ➕ to add symbols to this board!
empty.noButtons: No buttons yet! Tap + to add your first button.

voicePrompt.title: Better voices available
voicePrompt.subtitle: Download natural AI voices (80MB, one time, then works offline forever). The app works right now without this.
voicePrompt.progressHint: One time only · Works offline after this

install.title: Add FreeVoice to your Home Screen
install.instructions: Tap Share (⎙) then Add to Home Screen. Works offline once installed.
install.iosSub: Tap ⎙ then "Add to Home Screen" for the best experience
install.androidSub: Works offline and loads faster. Add to home screen in one tap.
